sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101436" key="sustala/ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συστᾰλάσσω</orth>, <sense id="n101436.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fuse together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:248:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">248.24</biblScope> </bibl> (dub.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
